# Functional Network

**Summary**: A generalization of standard neural networks that uses functional models instead of sigmoidal-like functions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-al-dhufairi|AL-DHUFAIRI, 2011]] used FunNet to model complex input-output relationships in mobility prediction.
